name: Rhubarb Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, beat together the butter, brown sugar, vanilla, and egg.
2. Mix the flour, baking powder, and salt in the top of a sifter, set over the butter mixture bowl, then sift into the bowl alternately with the sour cream. Blend well.
3. Fold in the rhubarb.
4. Spread the batter into a greased 8-inch square pan.
5. Crush about 6 lumps of sugar and mix with half a teaspoon of mace. Sprinkle over the top of the batter.
6. Bake in a preheated 350°F oven for 45 minutes. Makes one 8-inch square cake.
